name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Report for GSA completers. Provides actionable development tips based on Great 8 Domains coverage.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Measures knowledge of .NET environment including Application Development, Data Modeling, Deployment, Diagnostics, Performance and Security.

name: .NET MVC (New)
description: Measures knowledge of MVC architecture, validation, security, routing.

name: .NET MVVM (New)
description: Measures knowledge of MVVM pattern, scenarios, data validation, ViewModel communication.

name: .NET WCF (New)
description: Measures knowledge of .NET fundamentals, WCF architecture, programming model, SOA.

name: .NET WPF (New)
description: Measures knowledge of WPF, XAML controls, events, layouts.

name: .NET XAML (New)
description: Measures knowledge of XAML triggers, data binding, custom controls and layouts.

name: Accounts Payable (New)
description: Measures knowledge of processing payables and vendor invoices, and posting journal entries.

name: Accounts Receivable (New)
description: Measures knowledge of processing receivables and invoices.

description: Simulated data entry test measuring ability to process receivables and invoices.

name: ADO.NET (New)
description: Measures knowledge of ADO.NET architecture, components and data provider objects.

name: Adobe Photoshop CC
description: Measures knowledge of Adobe Photoshop CC including layers, color, selection and web.

name: Aeronautical Engineering (New)
description: Measures knowledge of flight mechanics, space dynamics, aerodynamics, structures and propulsion.

name: Aerospace Engineering (New)
description: Measures conceptual knowledge of aerodynamics, aircraft systems, flight dynamics, space dynamics and avionics.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Measures knowledge of agile methodology, scrum, feature driven software development.

name: Agile Testing (New)
description: Measures knowledge of tools, techniques and processes involved in Agile testing methodology.

name: AI Skills
description: Measures skills that help candidates successfully leverage AI in their work.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Measures knowledge of AWS delivery process, monitoring, metrics, logging, security, validation and scalability.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Android UI components, services, animation, security and testing.

name: Angular 6 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Angular 6 components, data binding, dependency injection, routing.

name: AngularJS (New)
description: Measures knowledge of AngularJS architecture, forms, directives, filters, controllers, routing.

name: Apache Hadoop (New)

description: Measures knowledge of HBase concepts, ACID properties, MapReduce integration.

name: Apache Hive (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Hive architecture, datatypes, functions, partitioning.

name: Apache Kafka (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Apache Kafka architecture, clusters, performance tuning.

name: Apache Pig (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Pig architecture, operators, functions and PigLatin commands.

name: Apache Spark (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Apache Spark principles, RDD operations, lineage graphs.

description: Measures knowledge of .NET framework, C# fundamentals, OOP, data access and security.

name: ASP.NET 4.5
description: Measures knowledge of ASP.NET programming environment, web applications, data access, security.

name: Assessment and Development Center Exercises
description: Comprehensive range of Assessment and Development Centre exercises in digital format for remote assessment including group exercises, role plays, analysis presentations.

name: Automata - Fix (New)
description: Simulated compiler test measuring debugging skills in C, C++ and Java.

name: Automata - SQL (New)
description: Simulated query writing test measuring ability to write SQL queries for DDL, DML and DCL tasks.

name: Automata (New)
description: AI-powered coding simulation in familiar IDE environment, 40+ programming languages, real-world problems.

name: Automata Data Science (New)
description: Simulated test measuring ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms.

name: Automata Data Science Pro (New)
description: Advanced simulated test measuring ability to analyze and modify data using ML algorithms.

name: Automata Front End
description: Simulation measuring front-end development capabilities using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

name: Automata Pro (New)
description: AI-powered coding simulation in IDE environment, 40+ programming languages.

name: Automata Selenium
description: Coding simulation measuring ability to conduct automation testing using Selenium scripts.

name: Automation Anywhere RPA Development (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Automation Anywhere dashboard, control room, bots and commands.

name: Automotive Engineering (New)
description: Measures knowledge of auto engine, fuel systems, vehicle technology, maintenance.

name: Basic Biology (New)
description: Measures basic understanding of Biology.

name: Basic Computer Literacy (Windows 10) (New)
description: Measures general computer terminology, processes and applications in a simulated Windows 10 environment.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Measures knowledge of statistical methods, exploratory analysis, probability, distributions and testing.

name: Biochemistry (New)
description: Measures knowledge of amino acids, proteins, enzymes, carbohydrates and bioenergetics.

name: Biotech Lab Techniques (New)
description: Measures knowledge of biophysical techniques, bio-processing and separation techniques.

name: Business Communication (adaptive)
description: Adaptive test measuring workplace communication skills including verbal, written and electronic communication.

description: Measures knowledge of communicating in the workplace including verbal, written and electronic communication. Non-adaptive version.

name: C Programming (New)
description: Measures knowledge of C programming basics, functions, arrays, composed data types.

description: Measures knowledge of C# programming structure, functions, collections, OOP, event handling.

description: Measures knowledge of C++ language and standard library.

description: Measures knowledge of ceramic materials, production of ceramics and thermodynamics.

name: Chemical Engineering (New)
description: Measures knowledge of transport phenomena, chemical process engineering and stoichiometry.

name: Civil Engineering (New)
description: Measures knowledge of structural engineering, transportation, surveying, geotechnical and water resources.

name: Cloud Computing (New)
description: Measures knowledge of cloud computing concepts, service models, virtualization and private clouds.

name: COBOL Programming (New)
description: Measures knowledge of COBOL programming fundamentals, structure and application processing.

name: Computer Science (New)
description: Measures knowledge of operating systems, computer architecture, DBMS and computer networks.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Simulation measuring ability to handle customer concerns over a call by referring to standard process documents.

name: Conversational Multichat Simulation
description: Simulation measuring ability to handle customer concerns over multiple chats, scoring resolution, time and vocabulary.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Java constructs, OOP, generics, collections, threads, concurrency and advanced Java.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Measures knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP, file handling, exception handling and threads.

name: CSS3 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of CSS3 and its application in providing style to web documents.

name: Cyber Risk (New)
description: Measures knowledge of cyber risk management, system security, network security and security management.

name: Data Entry (New)
description: Simulated data entry test measuring ability to accurately transcribe data and verify pre-filled data.

name: Data Entry Alphanumeric Split Screen - US
description: Measures speed and accuracy at typing text and numbers into forms.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Measures conceptual knowledge of machine learning to analyze data, extract information and make decisions.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Pre-screening tool identifying employees with good dependability and reliability, less likely to engage in counter-productive work behaviors. Used for safety-critical and entry-level roles.

name: Docker (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Docker containers, data management, performance and swarm.

name: Economics (New)
description: Measures conceptual knowledge of microeconomics, macroeconomics and international trade.

name: Electrical and Electronics Engineering (New)
description: Measures knowledge of electrical engineering fundamentals, instrumentation, control systems and electronics.

name: English Comprehension (New)
description: Measures vocabulary, grammar and reading comprehension skills.

name: Enterprise Leadership Report 1.0
description: Assess and benchmark leaders against enterprise leadership model for driving business results in complex environments.

name: Enterprise Leadership Report 2.0
description: Updated enterprise leadership report benchmarking leaders for complex work environments.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv-Retail & Contact Center
description: Personality and competency measure for entry-level customer service positions in retail and contact centre.

name: Entry Level Sales Solution
description: For entry-level sales roles requiring proactive selling and compensation based on revenue.

name: Executive Scenarios
description: Unique test of Managerial Judgement for executives. Hypothetical scenarios measuring ability to decide effective ways of handling real-life situations.

name: ExpressJS (New)
description: Measures knowledge of routing, error handling, security, middleware in ExpressJS.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Measures ability to post journal entries, classify financial items, analyze statements and calculate ratios.

name: Financial and Banking Services (New)
description: Measures knowledge of investment products, banking products, taxation and macroeconomics principles.

name: GIT (New)
description: Measures knowledge of how to use GIT for version control.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Measures 96 discrete skills/behaviors aligned to SHL's UCF. Assesses self-reported behaviors across the Great 8 Domains. Used for skills audits and talent development.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Unique Managerial Judgement test for graduates. Hypothetical scenarios assessing decision-making for those with limited work experience.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Measures knowledge of HIPAA security provisions for healthcare professionals. Covers computer mechanisms, medical records, security basics and implementation.

name: HiPo Assessment Report 1.0
description: Identifies individuals with strongest potential for senior roles using OPQ, MQ and Verify assessments.

name: HiPo Assessment Report 2.0
description: Updated high potential report evaluating aspiration, ability and engagement for future leader identification.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Measures knowledge of HTML for user interface and CSS for styling.

name: HTML5 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of HTML5 and its application in creating user interfaces.

name: Human Resources (New)
description: Measures knowledge of HR management concepts including planning, training, performance appraisal and compensation.

name: ITIL (IT Infrastructure Library) (New)
description: Measures knowledge of capacity management, change management and problem management.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC.

name: Java Frameworks (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Java frameworks including Struts, Hibernate and Spring.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Measures knowledge of JavaScript language and its application in front-end development.

name: Jenkins (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Jenkins configuration, deployment, plugins, nodes, build jobs and testing.

name: jQuery (New)
description: Measures knowledge of jQuery events, effects, animation, UI and AJAX.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Kubernetes architecture, cluster and services.

name: Linux Administration (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Linux operating system for system administration and network administration.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Measures knowledge of Linux programming including C, C++, debugging, makefiles, revision control and X programming.

name: Management Scenarios
description: Managerial Judgement test for managers. Hypothetical scenarios measuring ability to handle real-life management situations.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: Measures 32 workplace behaviour dimensions including strategic thinking, influencing style, leadership, and interpersonal style. Most widely used personality questionnaire for selection and development across all job levels.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: Report derived from OPQ32r providing competency-based feedback across all workplace roles using UCF.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: Leadership-focused report derived from OPQ32r. Benchmarks candidates against SHL leadership model.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Adaptive general ability test covering inductive, numerical, and deductive reasoning. Single adaptive test predicting learning agility and problem-solving across professional and managerial roles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Interactive numerical reasoning test measuring ability to interpret and work with numerical data in workplace contexts.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: Sales-specific report from OPQ32r summarizing personality results in terms of sales behaviours. Can incorporate Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) data for motivators and drives.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Measures how individual contributors show up in a digital-first selling model. Used for sales transformation initiatives.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Spoken English assessment calibrated for US accent. Used for contact centre and customer-facing role screening.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: Older bundled solution combining personality, behaviour and simulation for customer service phone roles. Used for finalist-stage depth assessment.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: Sector-specific bundled safety and dependability solution with norms calibrated to manufacturing and industrial workforces. Used when industrial norms are required.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring understanding of workplace health and safety regulations and practices.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Quick knowledge test measuring understanding of medical terminology for healthcare admin staff.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Essentials-level knowledge and simulation test for Microsoft Word 365.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Quick knowledge test for Microsoft Excel fundamentals.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Quick knowledge test for Microsoft Word fundamentals.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: Full knowledge and simulation test for Microsoft Excel 365.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: Full knowledge and simulation test for Microsoft Word 365.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Adaptive live-coding interview where the panel can frame language-specific tasks. Used for senior technical candidates when no dedicated language test exists.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Measures knowledge of networking concepts and implementation for infrastructure roles.

name: Spring (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Spring framework including Spring Boot, dependency injection and REST API design.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Measures knowledge of RESTful web service design and implementation.

name: SQL (New)
description: Measures knowledge of SQL including queries, joins, transactions and database design.
